raw:
{
  "judge_id": "JUDGE-001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Names the load-bearing concept (CommDiag) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.4": "Names one prior work (MAST taxonomy, 2025) and articulates the delta.",
    "R1.7": "Flags one missing or wrong citation (Cemri et al.'s MAST work)",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d)",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content)",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason"
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Names the load-bearing concept (CommDiag) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (MAST taxonomy, 2025) and articulates the delta.
rationale.R1.7: Flags one missing or wrong citation (Cemri et al.'s MAST work)
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d)
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content)
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason
